title: SMB Hack: Strange Mario Bros: The Lost Levels
description: This is me playing a SMB hack, called Strange Mario Bros: The Lost Levels, which is the sequel to the original Strange Mario Bros. The graphics and the levels are modified, and difficulty of the hack is just right. The black mushroom is poisonous, so I avoided touching it.. This hack is fun to play, at least it's not one of those almost-impossible-to-beat hacks.
